highlights.title: Fix stuck bolus-in-progress card
changes: The bolus-in-progress card in the Treatments view no longer gets stuck at 0% and block actions.
You can dismiss a bolus card and start new boluses without restarting the app.
Bolus progress is now detected more reliably and no longer depends on carb/fat/protein fields for visibility.

sources.title: nightscout/Trio#1320: Make bolus-in-progress card in Treatments view more reliable
Make bolus-in-progress card in Treatments view more reliable

includedPullRequests.title: Make bolus-in-progress card in Treatments view more reliable
includedPullRequests.body:
Some manual boluses left a bolusing card stuck at 0% in the Treatments view that blocked further boluses and could not be dismissed until the app was restarted (#1308).

The card was gated on bolusStatus, which mirrors the pump's reported bolusState and can stay at inProgress after delivery has finished. Since bolusTrigger now retains that value, the card resurfaced once a new amount was entered, and the X could not clear it because there was no active bolus to cancel.

Gate the card on bolusProgress instead, the local dose reporter signal that clears reliably and that the Home view already uses, keeping the initiating state so the pre-delivery view still shows.
